composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
BTC remains in a macro downtrend with price below the 200-day moving average and funding data unavailable—a structural bear phase marked by normal volatility rather than crisis conditions. ETH and SOL show mild underperformance versus BTC on institutional and risk-appetite metrics, but nothing extreme. The Fear and Greed index at 11 reflects depressed sentiment, yet no dislocation is present between derivatives positioning and on-chain flow. This is a BEAR cycle operating in BUSINESS_AS_USUAL quadrant.

The death cross on BTC and absence of altcoin rotation confirm the regime. Stablecoin dominance holding steady at 11 percent—neither spiking nor collapsing—shows patient positioning rather than panic or capitulation. No actionable opportunity emerges from this setup.
